report.summary: EOD v16 cycle-close (Mar 16): Quiet cycle — no new commits since Day 42 publish. Morpho Protocol guide (build-v14) sitting in working tree with 468 modified files blocked by git index.lock. TS errors steady at 42 (2 files). Rate limiter still 0/6 — 12th consecutive flag, FOMC T-2. All 6 API route files structurally healthy. PUBLISH_QUEUE at 2 items (stablechains + crypto-index-funds).

sections.title: QA Sweep
items: No new commits since last cycle (latest: cb65a9d — Day 42 publish). All recent work trapped in working tree by git index.lock.
Morpho Protocol guide (build-v14) scaffolded with page.tsx + MorphoVaultExplorer.tsx interactive component — sitting uncommitted.
PUBLISH_QUEUE: 2 items — /learn/stablechains-guide-2026 (page.tsx ✓) and /learn/crypto-index-funds-guide-2026 (page.tsx ✓, 2 TS errors: unescaped > in JSX).
PUBLISHED_PAGES: 366 raw slugs, ~353 unique after dedup. ~102 slugs missing page.tsx (~29%) — persistent carry-over, concentrated in /learn, /taxes, /wallets, /investing/best, /blog.
TypeScript: 42 errors across 2 files — 40 in structured-data.examples.ts (JSX in .ts file, rename to .tsx), 2 in crypto-index-funds-guide-2026/page.tsx. Non-blocking (ignoreBuildErrors: true).
Lint: next lint misconfigured ('Invalid project directory' error). Not blocking builds but should be fixed.
Last 10 published pages all have valid page.tsx files — no new regressions this cycle.

sections.title: Data Pipeline Health
items: /api/prices — CoinGecko /coins/markets, 60s in-memory TTL, s-maxage=60, stale cache fallback ✓
/api/fear-greed — alternative.me FNG, 600s in-memory TTL, s-maxage=600, no hardcoded fallback ⚠
/api/trending — CoinGecko /search/trending, 300s in-memory TTL, s-maxage=300, no hardcoded fallback ⚠
/api/market-metrics — CoinGecko global + FNG aggregated, 60s TTL, Promise.allSettled, FULL hardcoded fallback ✓
/api/market-dominance — CoinGecko global, 300s in-memory TTL, s-maxage=300, FULL FALLBACK_DATA ✓
/api/defi-yields — DefiLlama via lib/defillama, HTTP cache only (no in-memory TTL), s-maxage=300, NO fallback — returns 500 on error ⚠

PERSISTENT FLAG: checkRateLimit() NOT applied to any of the 6 public API routes. Only found in /api/cache-stats (5 refs) and /api/health (20 refs). 12th consecutive cycle flagged. FOMC Wed Mar 18 (T-2) — traffic spike risk on unprotected endpoints.

sections.title: DevOps Status
items: Vercel deployment: Last deploy from Day 42 publish (cb65a9d). No new commits — no new deploy triggered or needed.
Next.js 16.1.6 with --webpack flag. ignoreBuildErrors: true in next.config.ts. No vercel.json (default config).
git index.lock persists (created Mar 16 13:06) — blocking ALL commits. 468 modified/untracked files in working tree (up from 457 in eod-v15). Critical operational bottleneck growing each cycle.
Security headers configured: X-DNS-Prefetch-Control, X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy. Static assets immutable cache (31536000s).
next lint misconfigured — returns 'Invalid project directory' error. Non-blocking for Vercel but degrades local QA.

sections.title: Project Manager — Cycle Summary
items: QUIET CYCLE — No new commits or deploys since last cycle. Morpho Protocol guide (build-v14) is the latest content asset, sitting uncommitted.
Community v31 was the latest active workstream: SEC-CFTC MOU regulatory content, BTC $74K fear cycle narrative, Aave V4 launch, Lido V3 strategy, 2 new social SVG cards.
Today's output: 14 build cycles, 31 community cycles, 13 design cycles, 9 publish cycles, 16 EOD cycles (this is v16). Extremely productive day across all workstreams.
PUBLISH_QUEUE: 2 items ready. crypto-index-funds needs 2 TS fixes before promotion. Morpho guide not yet in queue (needs commit first).

CARRY-OVER: git index.lock removal [P0], rate limiter wiring [P0], Vercel payment [P0-Jefe], crypto-index-funds TS fix [P1], defi-yields fallback data [P1], lint config fix [P2], published-pages dedup [P2].

sections.title: Blockers — Jefe Attention Required
items: 🔴 [P0] git index.lock — blocking ALL commits since 13:06 today. 468 modified files growing. Must rm .git/index.lock and carefully stage+commit.
🔴 [P0] Rate limiter: 0/6 public API routes protected. FOMC Wed Mar 18 (T-2). 12th consecutive cycle flagged — highest priority technical debt.
🔴 [P0] Vercel trial ~4 days remaining — add payment method or risk service interruption.
🟡 [P1] crypto-index-funds-guide-2026 has 2 TS errors (unescaped > in JSX at lines 531/533) — fix before promoting.
🟡 [P1] defi-yields API has no fallback data — returns 500 on DefiLlama outage.
🟡 [P1] next lint misconfigured — 'Invalid project directory' error on npm run lint.
🟡 ~29% published slugs (102) missing page.tsx — returning 404 to crawlers.
🟢 [P2] 12 duplicate entries in PUBLISHED_PAGES set — cosmetic cleanup.
